title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Procter & Gamble India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Procter & Gamble India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Procter & Gamble India has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Raipur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Procter & Gamble India:
Procter & Gamble India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Procter & Gamble India!
